sections.title: Stay programs
paragraphs: Hotels within Forest City cater to golf visitors, corporate groups, and owner-buyers conducting multi-day due diligence. Packages may include daily transport to golf, marina leisure, and scheduled unit inspections.

facts.label: Use cases
facts.value: Golf travel, corporate visits, owner inspections

faq.q: Can hotel stays include property tours?
faq.a: Yes — we add viewing slots to golf or corporate itineraries when units are accessible.
